name: Workers comp vs personal injury suit after ladder fall in Millcreek?
description: Comp for employer; sue others for more.[5]

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs personal injury suit after ladder fall in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for employer; sue others for more.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp for employer no-fault; sue third-parties like ladder maker for full damages.** Utah comp excludes pain/suffering.[5] Key factors: Comp quicker, limited; suits higher potential but prove fault. Can't sue employer usually. Lawyer advises path.
